ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Riaccesi academy in Palermo. For a biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, pp. 163-164 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.) Portraits from Filadelfo Mugnos,Teatro Genealogico Delle Famiglie Del Fedelissimo Regno di Sicilia, Palermo, 1647 (BL Shelfmark: 137.e.11.); Filadelfo Mugnos, Raguagli Historici Del Vespro Siciliano, Palermo, 1669, (BL Shelfmark: 175.a.19.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
